data.title: Sealand Capital Galaxy CEO Discusses Future Plans in StockBox Media Interview
data.description:
Sealand Capital Galaxy ( (GB:SCGL) ) has provided an update.

Sealand Capital Galaxy Limited announced that its CEO, Dr. Thomas Sawyer, was interviewed by StockBox Media, where he discussed the company’s current status, future plans, and his views on AI in capital markets. This interview could provide insights into Sealand’s strategic direction and its potential impact on the technology industry, offering stakeholders a glimpse into the company’s future initiatives.

More about Sealand Capital Galaxy

Sealand Capital Galaxy Limited is an IT, Social Media, and Technology company that focuses on consolidating compelling technology opportunities in the global marketplace. The company’s shares are traded on the transition category of the London Stock Exchange under the ticker LSE: SCGL.

data.title: AJ Bell PLC Updates Shareholders on Total Voting Rights
data.description:
The latest update is out from AJ BELL PLC ( (GB:AJB) ).

AJ Bell PLC announced that as of 28 February 2025, its issued share capital consists of 409,588,720 ordinary shares, each with one voting right, and no shares held in Treasury. This update on total voting rights is crucial for shareholders to determine their notification requirements under FCA rules.

More about AJ BELL PLC

AJ Bell PLC operates in the financial services industry, primarily offering investment platforms and stockbroking services. The company focuses on providing a range of financial products and services to individual investors and financial advisers.

data.title: Infinera Completes Merger, Alters Convertible Notes Structure
data.description:
Infinera ( (INFN) ) has issued an update.

Infinera has completed a merger that affects its Convertible Senior Notes due 2027 and 2028, changing their conversion rights from company stock to a mix of cash and Nokia ADSs. Additionally, Infinera terminated a $200 million revolving credit facility and initiated a Change of Control Offer to purchase outstanding Convertible Notes, marking a significant shift in its financial structure and stakeholder rights.

More about Infinera

Infinera operates in the telecommunications industry, primarily providing optical networking equipment and solutions. The company focuses on delivering high-capacity, scalable, and programmable optical transport networks to service providers, cloud operators, and enterprises.

Average Trading Volume: 912,926

data.title: Photozou Holdings Delays Annual Report Filing
data.description:
Photozou Holdings ( (PTZH) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Photozou Holdings, Inc. has announced a delay in filing its Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the financial period ending November 30, 2024. The company cites the need for additional time to compile necessary financial information and ensure thorough disclosure as the primary reason for the delay. Management expects to file the report within the extension period provided, which is anticipated to be within fifteen calendar days following the original due date. Importantly, the company does not anticipate any significant changes in its financial results compared to the previous fiscal year. The notification is signed by Koichi Ishizuka, President and Director, indicating ongoing compliance efforts.

More about Photozou Holdings

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $80M

data.title: Thai Beverage Holds 2025 Annual General Meeting
data.description:
Thai Beverage Public Co ( (SG:Y92) ) has issued an announcement.

Thai Beverage Public Company Limited recently held its 2025 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders at the Queen Sirikit National Convention Center in Bangkok. The meeting was attended by a number of independent directors and auditors from KPMG Phoomchai Audit Ltd., highlighting the company’s commitment to transparency and governance. The absence of the Chairman, Mr. Charoen Sirivadhanabhakdi, was noted, but the presence of key directors and the Group CEO ensured that the meeting proceeded effectively.

data.title: IAG Launches €500 Million Share Buyback Program
data.description:
International Consolidated Airlines ( (GB:IAG) ) has provided an update.

International Consolidated Airlines Group (IAG) has initiated the first tranche of a €1,000 million share buyback program, starting with €500 million. The program aims to reduce IAG’s share capital and involves strategic participation from Qatar Airways to maintain its stake. The buyback will be conducted on the London and Spanish Stock Exchanges and is expected to impact the company’s capital structure positively.

More about International Consolidated Airlines

International Consolidated Airlines Group (IAG) operates in the aviation industry, providing air transportation services. The company is a major player in the airline sector with a focus on international travel and operates several well-known airline brands.

data.title: City of London Investment Management Increases Stake in Pacific Horizon Investment Trust
data.description:
The latest update is out from Pacific Horizon Investment Trust PLC ( (GB:PHI) ).

The notification from Pacific Horizon Investment Trust PLC reveals that City of London Investment Management Company Limited has increased its voting rights in the company to 15.14%, up from a previous 14.75%. This change in holdings signifies a strengthened position for City of London Investment Management within Pacific Horizon, potentially influencing future decisions and strategies of the investment trust.

More about Pacific Horizon Investment Trust PLC

Pacific Horizon Investment Trust PLC is a UK-based investment company that primarily focuses on investing in the Asia-Pacific region, excluding Japan. The company aims to deliver long-term capital growth by investing in a diversified portfolio of companies across various sectors within this geographic market.

data.title: Arbe Robotics to Announce Q4 & FY 2024 Financial Results
data.description:
Arbe Robotics ( (ARBE) ) has issued an announcement.

Arbe Robotics Ltd. announced that it will host a live conference call on March 5, 2025, to discuss its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The announcement, made on February 12, 2025, highlights the company’s commitment to transparency and engagement with stakeholders. The call will feature key executives and provide insights into the company’s financial performance and strategic direction. This event is significant for stakeholders as it offers a detailed look at Arbe’s operations and market positioning amid ongoing geopolitical challenges in Israel.

More about Arbe Robotics

Arbe Robotics Ltd. is a global leader in perception radar solutions, focusing on enabling safe driver-assist systems and paving the way for full autonomous driving. The company’s radar technology is significantly more detailed than others on the market, serving as a critical sensor for advanced autonomy levels. Arbe’s technology empowers automakers, Tier 1 suppliers, and various vehicle applications with advanced sensing capabilities. The company is headquartered in Tel Aviv, Israel, with offices in China, Germany, and the United States.

data.title: Paragon REIT Updates Trust Deed for Electronic Communication
data.description:
Paragon REIT ( (SG:SK6U) ) has shared an update.

Paragon REIT Management Pte. Ltd. has announced amendments to the trust deed of Paragon REIT, allowing for electronic dissemination of notices or documents related to take-over offers or rights issues, in compliance with relevant laws and guidelines. These amendments, certified by the trustee as non-prejudicial to unitholders’ interests, do not require their approval and are intended to streamline communication processes for the trust.

More about Paragon REIT

Paragon REIT is a real estate investment trust based in Singapore, managed by Paragon REIT Management Pte. Ltd. The trust focuses on real estate investments and operates under the regulations of the Singapore Exchange Securities Trading Limited.
